brand.name: INKERASTORY
brand.product: personalized photo and quote canvas print
brand.audience: TikTok Shop buyers looking for personalized wall art and meaningful gifts

global_specs.visual_quality: premium ecommerce product photography, crisp details, high contrast, bright natural light
must_show: the personalized canvas or print as a real physical wall art product
clear print texture or canvas texture

themes.positioning: Seasonal soccer fever gift angle for the June 11 to July 19, 2026 global tournament window, without official FIFA marks.
compliance_notes: Use generic international soccer championship language in prompts.
Do not include the FIFA logo, World Cup logo, official trophy, official mascot, official posters, team crests, player likenesses, or national team uniforms.
Use generic scarves, face paint, soccer balls, green field mood, and family fan moments.

assets.hook: A clean product-first image for the listing main image.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop main product image
Primary request: Create a clean ecommerce product image for INKERASTORY personalized canvas wall art inspired by international soccer celebration season.
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background, soft shadow only under the physical product, no props touching the product.
Subject: one rectangular stretched canvas showing a tasteful generic family soccer celebration photo transformed into wall art; no readable official logos, no team crests, no player likenesses, no FIFA or World Cup marks.
Composition: square 1:1, product centered, canvas fills about 85% of the frame, crisp front angle with slight depth visible on the canvas edge.
Style: premium ecommerce photography, bright clean light, high-resolution realistic print texture.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no logos except no visible brand logo.

assets.hook: Turns match-day emotion into a wall-art memory.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image / ad creative
Primary request: Create a scroll-stopping lifestyle image for a personalized soccer memory canvas.
Scene/backdrop: warm living room watch-party scene, friends and family celebrating a goal, green and neutral decor, generic soccer scarves with no official marks.
Subject: a framed INKERASTORY-style canvas on the wall showing a custom family soccer celebration photo, clearly visible as the product.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas is the focal point, people are secondary and slightly behind or beside it, energetic but not cluttered.
Style: realistic lifestyle photography, bright celebratory mood, premium home decor aesthetic.
Text policy: no in-image text, no watermarks, no official sports logos, no team names.

assets.hook: Gift angle for soccer fans.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary image
Primary request: Create an emotional gift-unboxing scene for a custom soccer fan canvas print.
Scene/backdrop: modern home, neutral table, simple gift box, subtle green field-inspired accents.
Subject: a person opening a gift box and revealing a personalized canvas with a generic soccer family photo and custom quote area, no readable official text or sports marks.
Composition: square 1:1, hands and gift box in foreground, canvas upright and legible as the product, warm human emotion.
Style: photorealistic natural light, premium gift photography, high clarity.
Text policy: avoid readable text except a vague short custom quote shape if necessary; no watermarks, no official tournament or team branding.

assets.hook: Shows the canvas in a soccer fan living room for scale and context.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop room mockup
Primary request: Create a warm living room mockup with a soccer memory canvas as the centerpiece.
Scene/backdrop: modern living room, neutral walls, light sofa, subtle green soccer-themed accents (generic scarves, soccer ball decor) — no official logos.
Subject: a large rectangular canvas showing a generic soccer family celebration memory photo, hanging above the sofa, realistic canvas texture.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas large and centered, room provides lifestyle scale context.
Style: premium interior photography, celebratory but not cluttered, realistic proportions.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no official sports logos.

assets.hook: Size comparison chart — helps buyers pick the right canvas size.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop size comparison chart
Primary request: Create a clean size comparison wall display showing four canvas sizes for a soccer memory canvas product line.
Scene/backdrop: bright white or very light neutral wall, identical consistent camera angle for all four canvases — same eye-level perspective, no distortion.
Subject: four rectangular stretched canvases arranged in a horizontal row in ascending size order, each showing a different generic soccer celebration photo (no official logos, no team crests). Canvases are: 8×12 in (smallest, left), 12×18 in, 16×24 in, 24×36 in (largest, right). Each canvas has a clean size label below it in simple sans-serif text.
A small everyday object (a ceramic mug or a chair) is visible at the edge for real-world scale reference.
Composition: square 1:1, all four canvases on the same wall at the same height baseline, size labels clearly readable below each canvas, even spacing between canvases.
Style: realistic interior product photography, consistent even lighting across all four canvases, neutral professional aesthetic.
Text policy: size labels only — '8×12 in', '12×18 in', '16×24 in', '24×36 in' — in clean readable text; no other overlays, no watermarks.
Avoid: watermarks, tilted or perspective-distorted canvases, mismatched lighting between canvases, official sports logos

Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image — Print Only flat mockup
Primary request: Create an energetic product image showing an INKERASTORY custom fan celebration print as a flat unframed poster.
Scene/backdrop: dark wood or slate surface, flat-lay with subtle football props (small ball, team scarf), dynamic side-lighting.
Subject: one flat unframed matte poster showing a fan celebration scene with crowd energy, clean white border — clearly a paper poster, no frame no canvas.
Composition: square 1:1, poster centered, strong directional shadow under paper edges showing flat thin paper.
Style: premium flat-lay sports photography, dramatic lighting, bold and energetic — flat paper poster, no canvas depth.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: canvas texture, stretcher bars, 3D depth, frame, recognizable athlete likenesses, watermarks
assets.hook: Bold flat-lay of the unframed fan poster — shows the Print Only format clearly.

themes.positioning: Evergreen emotional gift angle for dog, cat, and pet-owner memories.
compliance_notes: Use original-looking pets only, not famous internet pets or copyrighted characters.
Show the canvas as a physical product, not just an AI portrait.
Keep fur detail realistic and avoid exaggerated pet expressions.

assets.hook: A clean product-first image for the listing main image.
assets.prompt:

Asset type: TikTok Shop main product image
Primary request: Create a clean ecommerce product image for INKERASTORY personalized pet portrait canvas wall art.
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background, soft shadow only under the physical canvas, no clutter.
Subject: one rectangular stretched canvas showing a beautiful custom portrait of a dog and cat together, realistic fur detail, warm eye contact, printed on canvas with visible edge depth.
Composition: square 1:1, product centered, canvas fills about 85% of frame, front angle with slight side depth.
Style: premium ecommerce photography, bright clean light, high-resolution realistic canvas texture.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no platform UI.

assets.hook: Owner emotion drives saves and shares.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image / ad creative
Primary request: Create an emotional lifestyle image of a pet owner reacting to a personalized pet portrait canvas.
Scene/backdrop: cozy living room with soft daylight, pet bed and neutral decor.
Subject: a smiling pet owner holding a custom canvas portrait of their dog, with the real dog sitting nearby; the canvas must clearly look like the product.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas and dog are the focal points, human emotion visible but not overpowering the product.
Style: photorealistic natural lifestyle photography, warm and giftable, premium home decor mood.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.

assets.hook: Gentle keepsake angle without feeling sad or heavy.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image
Primary request: Create a tasteful pet memorial keepsake scene for a custom pet portrait canvas.
Scene/backdrop: calm bedroom or reading corner, soft morning light, small flowers, neutral wall.
Subject: a rectangular canvas showing a beloved pet portrait, displayed respectfully on a wall or shelf; product is clear and premium.
Composition: square 1:1, peaceful emotional mood, canvas centered with a little surrounding decor.
Style: realistic lifestyle photography, gentle and warm, not dark, not overly sad.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no readable memorial dates.

assets.hook: Shows how pet art upgrades home decor.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop room mockup
Primary request: Create a modern room mockup for personalized pet portrait wall art.
Scene/backdrop: bright modern living room with a sofa, neutral tones, clean decor, soft daylight.
Subject: a large rectangular custom canvas portrait of a golden retriever and a tabby cat hanging above the sofa, realistic canvas texture and edge depth.
Composition: square 1:1, product large and centered, room gives scale but does not distract.
Style: premium interior photography, warm and sophisticated, realistic proportions.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.

assets.hook: Size comparison chart — helps buyers pick the right canvas size for their wall.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop size comparison chart
Primary request: Create a clean, accurate size comparison display showing four canvas sizes for a pet portrait product line.
Scene/backdrop: bright white or very light neutral wall, identical consistent camera angle and lighting for all four canvases — same eye-level straight-on perspective with no distortion or tilt.
Subject: four rectangular stretched canvases arranged in a horizontal row in ascending size order, each showing a different pet portrait (a golden retriever, a tabby cat, a beagle, and a mixed-breed dog). Canvases are: 8×12 in (smallest, leftmost), 12×18 in, 16×24 in, 24×36 in (largest, rightmost). Each canvas must have its size label in clean sans-serif text directly below it.
A ceramic mug on a small shelf near the 8×12 canvas provides a real-world scale anchor.
Composition: square 1:1, all four canvases share the same wall, same height baseline, consistent spacing between them, size labels clearly legible.
Style: realistic interior product photography, bright even lighting across all canvases, professional neutral aesthetic, premium quality.
Text policy: size labels only — '8×12 in', '12×18 in', '16×24 in', '24×36 in' — in clean readable text beneath each canvas; no other overlays, no watermarks.
Avoid: watermarks, perspective distortion, mismatched angles between canvases, dramatically different lighting on different canvases, cluttered backgrounds

Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image — Print Only flat mockup
Primary request: Create a clean product image showing an INKERASTORY custom pet portrait as a flat unframed art print.
Scene/backdrop: white marble or light wood surface, slight-angle flat-lay, minimal clean styling with a small plant or mug for scale.
Subject: one flat unframed matte art print showing a custom dog and cat portrait, clean white border, no frame, no canvas stretcher bars — clearly a paper print.
Composition: square 1:1, print centered, soft shadow under the paper edges showing it is flat and thin.
Style: premium flat-lay product photography, bright natural light, matte paper finish clearly visible — not a canvas, no 3D depth, no wrapped edges.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: canvas texture, stretcher bars, frame, 3D gallery-wrap depth, watermarks, platform UI
assets.hook: Shows the flat unframed print option — helps buyers understand the Print Only variant.

themes.positioning: Customer uploads their pet photo; we print it as-is on premium canvas. Sells on photo quality, color accuracy, and canvas texture.
compliance_notes: Do not show a specific customer's real photo — use a generic stock-looking pet photo as the example.
Emphasize print resolution and color fidelity, not AI transformation.

assets.hook: Premium print-quality canvas — the product speaks for itself.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop main product image
Primary request: Create a clean ecommerce product image for INKERASTORY original pet photo canvas print.
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background, soft shadow under canvas only.
Subject: one rectangular stretched canvas showing a crisp, photorealistic high-resolution print of a golden retriever looking at the camera; the print quality must look professional — sharp fur detail, accurate warm tones, true-to-life colors.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas fills 85% of frame, slight side depth visible.
Style: premium ecommerce photography, bright clean light, emphasize realistic print texture.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: watermarks, distorted hands, messy backgrounds, AI-stylized or painted look — this must look like a real photograph printed on canvas

assets.hook: Close-up detail shot — shows print resolution and canvas texture.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary image — product detail close-up
Primary request: Create a macro close-up image showing the premium print quality of a pet photo canvas.
Scene/backdrop: white or very light neutral surface, angled lighting to show canvas weave.
Subject: extreme close-up of a stretched canvas corner showing: (1) realistic dog fur printed in high resolution, (2) visible canvas texture weave beneath the print, (3) the wooden frame edge wrap.
Composition: square 1:1, fill frame with the close-up detail, slightly angled for depth.
Style: premium product photography macro shot, sharp focus, high contrast.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: blurry images, watermarks, AI-painted or illustrated look

assets.hook: Simple 3-step 'How It Works' visual — builds buyer confidence.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop infographic-style image showing the order process
Primary request: Create a clean, minimal 3-step process image: Upload Photo → We Print → You Receive.
Scene/backdrop: white background, clean modern layout.
Subject: three panels in a horizontal flow: (1) a phone showing a pet photo, (2) a printing machine or canvas being produced, (3) a smiling person receiving a packaged canvas delivery.
Composition: square 1:1, three equal panels with arrows between them, very clear visual hierarchy.
Style: clean infographic illustration style, friendly and modern, soft colors.
Text policy: very simple short labels only — 'Upload', 'We Print', 'You Receive' — minimal readable text allowed.
Avoid: watermarks, complex text, stock photo clichés, distorted hands

assets.hook: Room mockup showing scale and placement in a real home.
assets.prompt:

Asset type: TikTok Shop room mockup

Scene/backdrop: bright Scandinavian-style living room, white walls, minimal decor.
Subject: a large canvas with a photorealistic print of a golden retriever hanging above a light-colored sofa.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas is the focal point, room provides scale context.
Style: premium interior photography, warm and inviting, realistic proportions.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: watermarks, AI-painted or illustrated style on the canvas — must look like a real photo print

Sizes: 8×12 in (left), 12×18 in, 16×24 in, 24×36 in (right). Each canvas has its size label in clean sans-serif text below it.
A ceramic mug on a shelf near the smallest canvas gives a real-world scale reference.

Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image — Print Only flat mockup
Primary request: Create a clean product image showing an INKERASTORY original-style custom pet portrait as a flat unframed art print.
Scene/backdrop: white or light cream surface, slight-angle flat-lay, soft natural light, minimal props.
Subject: one flat unframed matte print showing a realistic pet portrait in natural photographic style, clean white border, visible matte paper texture — no frame, no canvas.

assets.hook: Flat-lay of the unframed art print — shows matte paper finish and border.

themes.positioning: Customer uploads pet photo; AI transforms it into a regal oil-painting-style royal portrait, then printed on premium canvas.
compliance_notes: No copyright-infringing crowns or heraldry from real royal families.
Use generic regal regalia — velvet, gold tones, classical oil-painting style.
Show the canvas as a physical printed product, not a digital image.

assets.hook: Hero product shot — royal portrait canvas on clean white background.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop main product image
Primary request: Create a premium ecommerce product image for an AI royal portrait pet canvas.
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background, soft shadow under the canvas only, no props.
Subject: one rectangular stretched canvas showing an AI-generated royal oil-painting portrait of a golden retriever — the dog wears a velvet cloak and a simple gold crown, painted in rich classical oil portrait style with warm amber and deep burgundy tones, visible canvas texture.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas fills 85% of frame, front angle with slight edge depth visible.
Style: premium ecommerce photography, bright clean light, canvas texture clearly visible.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no platform UI.
Avoid: watermarks, copyright logos, photorealistic style (must look like an oil painting), real celebrity or royal likenesses, distorted anatomy

assets.hook: Before / After — the most scroll-stopping hook for AI transformation.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop before-and-after comparison image
Primary request: Create a split-panel image showing the AI royal portrait transformation: casual pet photo → royal portrait canvas.
Scene/backdrop: clean white background, subtle vertical dividing line between two panels.
Left panel: a casual-looking smartphone photo of a golden retriever, slightly informal, natural lighting — representing a customer upload. Small label "Your Photo" at top.
Right panel: a rectangular canvas on a wooden easel showing the same dog transformed into a royal oil portrait (velvet cloak, gold crown, warm amber tones). Small label "Your Canvas" at top.
Composition: square 1:1, two equal panels side by side, clear visual contrast between casual photo and premium artwork.
Style: clean product photography for right panel, realistic snapshot feel for left panel.
Text policy: minimal — "Your Photo" and "Your Canvas" labels only.
Avoid: watermarks, complex text, distorted proportions, celebrity likenesses

assets.hook: Owner holding the royal portrait — gift-giving emotion.

Subject: a smiling person holding a canvas showing a royal oil-painting style portrait of their dog; the real dog sits nearby looking at the canvas. The canvas artwork is clearly the royal portrait style — velvet, crown, oil-painting feel.
Composition: square 1:1, canvas and dog are the focal points, person shows genuine happy emotion.
Style: photorealistic warm lifestyle photography, premium home decor mood, giftable.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark.
Avoid: watermarks, distorted hands, celebrity likenesses, too-perfect stock photo feel

themes.positioning: Customer uploads pet photo; AI transforms it into a cute anime or kawaii illustration style, then printed on premium canvas.
compliance_notes: Use original anime/kawaii illustration style — no specific IP characters (no Pikachu, no Disney, no existing anime characters).
Style should be kawaii/cute illustration, not a copy of any existing franchise.
Show the canvas as a physical printed product.

themes.positioning: Your pet wearing their team's soccer jersey — World Cup season gift for fans.
compliance_notes: Use generic jersey colors and stripe patterns only — no official team logos, crests, or badges.
Reference team by color scheme and name in prompt only; final image must show no identifiable marks.
Pet face must be the primary focus; jersey is secondary.

assets.hook: Pet in team jersey — instantly recognizable gift for soccer fans.
assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop main product image
Primary request: Create a clean ecommerce product image for INKERASTORY personalized pet portrait canvas — soccer kit edition.
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background, soft shadow only under the canvas, no clutter.
Subject: one rectangular stretched canvas showing a joyful custom portrait of a dog or cat wearing a miniature soccer jersey in {team_colors} ({team_name} team colors), no official logos or badges. Pet face expressive and front-facing, fur detail realistic.
Composition: square 1:1, product centered, canvas fills about 85% of frame, front angle with slight side depth.
Style: premium ecommerce photography, bright clean light, high-resolution realistic canvas texture.
Text policy: no overlay text, no watermark, no platform UI.
Avoid: exact reproduction of official trademarked team crests or registered logos, watermarks, distorted pet anatomy, copyrighted characters

assets.hook: Before/After shows the transformation and the jersey detail.
assets.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: TikTok Shop secondary product image / ad creative
Primary request: Create a before-and-after comparison for INKERASTORY pet soccer jersey portrait canvas.
Left panel: a regular casual phone photo of a dog or cat.
